meta.notes: Most skills appear as single-level unlocks. Some skills are mutually exclusive (e.g., Carpentry vs Blacksmithing). Legend tree is locked until level 30.

battles.name: Sixth Sense
battles.description: You will be able to see the resources in players' holds when hovering over a target, just like with NPCs.

levels.effect: See resources in players' holds when hovering over a target

battles.name: Squadron Captain
battles.description: Take up to 3 ships into your squadron by boardings or bribing.

levels.effect: Take up to 3 ships into your squadron by boardings or bribing

battles.name: Targeted Fire
battles.description: Single cannon shots become 50% more accurate and 50% more effective at penetrating the stern and bow of an enemy ship.

levels.effect: Single cannon shots become 50% more accurate and 50% more effective at penetrating stern and bow

battles.name: Slaveholding
battles.description: Take prisoners in addition to the captured crew during boardings. We can always find use for them...

levels.effect: Take prisoners in addition to captured crew during boardings

battles.name: Salvo Fire
battles.description: Execute a quick and concentrated broadside salvo that can also detonate sinking ships. Switch with [Alt]. A 3-second delay follows each salvo.

levels.effect: Quick broadside salvo, can detonate sinking ships, 3-second delay between salvos

battles.name: Fire Extinguishing
battles.description: Firefighting is now an automatic background task performed by your crew, no shouting necessary.

levels.effect: Firefighting becomes automatic background task

battles.name: Donor
battles.description: Some durability is restored following a successful boarding.

levels.effect: Some durability restored after successful boarding

battles.name: Double Salvo
battles.description: Fire salvoes from both sides simultaneously by holding [Alt] and the fire button.

levels.effect: Fire salvoes from both sides simultaneously

battles.name: Vulnerabilities
battles.description: Damage to the crew from any ammo type, except for grapeshot, will be increased by a third.

levels.effect: Crew damage from all ammo except grapeshot increased by 33%

battles.name: Repair Gear
battles.description: Captured ships will be repaired by 50% of their durability.

levels.effect: Captured ships repaired by 50% durability

battles.name: Right Hand
battles.description: Hire more specialist crew on your ship: +1 place.

levels.effect: +1 specialist crew slot
Aim guns 1.5x faster

battles.name: Mining
battles.description: Set a 2-4 minute fuse on powder barrels. For mines +1 minute.

levels.effect: Set 2-4 minute fuse on powder barrels; mines get +1 minute

battles.name: Morale
battles.description: Special crew wages are reduced by a third.

levels.effect: Special crew wages reduced by 33%

craft.name: Protection
craft.description: Captured ships will receive less damage when losing command.

levels.effect: Captured ships receive less damage when losing command

craft.name: Combat Log
craft.description: You can take up to 4 quests from the tavern.

levels.effect: Take up to 4 quests from the tavern

craft.name: Trade Affairs
craft.description: Ability to post lots of goods and orders on the exchange.

levels.effect: Post 5 lots of goods and orders on the exchange

craft.name: Helping Hand
craft.description: Each completed quest restores 10-20 units of craft time.

levels.effect: Each completed quest restores 10-20 units of craft time

craft.name: Quartermaster
craft.description: Increase the warehouse capacity of all mines and manufactories by 25%.

levels.effect: Warehouse capacity of all mines and manufactories +25%

craft.name: Trade License
craft.description: Post up to 20 lots of goods and orders on the exchange.

levels.effect: Post up to 20 lots on the exchange

craft.name: Apprentice
craft.description: Create more items at the port with a limit of 600 craft-time units and a respawn rate of 40 units per hour.

levels.effect: 600 craft-time unit limit, 40 units/hour respawn rate

craft.name: Quick Delivery
craft.description: Increase the operational speed of mines and manufactories in dangerous waters by 25%.

levels.effect: Mine/manufactory speed in dangerous waters +25%

craft.name: Even the Scraps
craft.description: Dismantling captured ships yields 33% more wood and fabric, plus a few beams.

levels.effect: +33% wood and fabric from dismantling, plus bonus beams

craft.name: Master
craft.description: Increases the craft-time limit to 1000 units and the respawn rate to 50 units per hour.

levels.effect: Craft-time limit: 1000 units, respawn rate: 50 units/hour

craft.name: Self-Supply
craft.description: High-level mines and manufactories will keep running without provisions, but production rate slows to just below level 2. Does not affect farms.

levels.effect: Mines/manufactories run without provisions at reduced rate (below level 2); farms unaffected

craft.name: Carpentry
craft.description: Production of beams and bulkheads is 7% cheaper in ports.

levels.effect: Beam and bulkhead production 7% cheaper in ports

craft.name: Blacksmithing
craft.description: Reduce the cost of producing plates and bronze in ports by 10%.

levels.effect: Plate and bronze production 10% cheaper in ports

craft.name: Workforce Management
craft.description: Gain a +5 unit bonus to the craft-time limit for each specialization workshop across different ports.

levels.effect: +5 craft-time limit per specialization workshop across ports

craft.name: Alloys
craft.description: Casting the best weapons in ports with a weapons workshop is 10% cheaper.

levels.effect: Best weapons casting 10% cheaper in ports with weapons workshop

craft.name: Underground Hall
craft.description: Build 2 Specialty Workshops in dangerous water ports without warehouse ties.

levels.effect: Build 2 Specialty Workshops in dangerous water ports without warehouse ties

exploration.name: Seamanship
exploration.description: Cruising speed is higher when sailing on a broad reach with the wind (the wind direction indicator turns green).

levels.effect: Higher cruising speed when sailing on a broad reach with the wind

exploration.name: Fast Travel
exploration.description: You will be able to travel twice in a row instead of once between neighboring non-pirate ports, without resources.

levels.effect: Travel twice in a row between neighboring non-pirate ports without resources

exploration.name: Escort
exploration.description: Enter ports through the lighthouse under any flag except military (only if port entry is allowed).

levels.effect: Enter ports via lighthouse under any flag except military

exploration.name: Decoy Flags
exploration.description: Reduces the aggression distance of dangerous NPCs by a third.

levels.effect: NPC aggression distance reduced by 33%

exploration.name: Logistics
exploration.description: Fast travel twice in a row.

levels.effect: Fast travel twice in a row

exploration.name: Personal Islands
exploration.description: You can own a second personal island and travel between them.

levels.effect: Own a second personal island and travel between them

exploration.name: Good Connections
exploration.description: Unlocks contraband quests. Good profit, but peace flags are unavailable.

levels.effect: Unlocks contraband quests; disables peace flags

exploration.name: Storekeeper
exploration.description: Store more resources across the world by having up to 6 warehouses.

levels.effect: Up to 6 warehouses

exploration.name: Third Island
exploration.description: Three personal islands are even better than two. The travel interval is reduced, allowing for faster movement between islands.

levels.effect: Own 3 personal islands with reduced travel interval

exploration.name: Illegal Mooring
exploration.description: Cut mooring fees by 50% (does not affect Peace Flags).

levels.effect: Mooring fees reduced by 50% (Peace Flags unaffected)

exploration.name: Patrician
exploration.description: Store even more resources: up to 11 warehouses.

levels.effect: Up to 11 warehouses

exploration.name: Workforce
exploration.description: Build up to 4 different mines and manufactories, instead of 2.

levels.effect: Build up to 4 mines/manufactories (up from 2)

exploration.name: Trade Pact
exploration.description: Purchase ammunition at cost from merchants and settlements at sea and encounter more trading opportunities.

levels.effect: Buy ammo at cost from merchants/settlements; more trading opportunities

exploration.name: Arsenal
exploration.description: The consumable item limit in the warehouse is increased to 400.

levels.effect: Consumable item warehouse limit increased to 400

exploration.name: Construction Expertise
exploration.description: Allows the construction of 6 different mines and manufactories.

levels.effect: Build up to 6 mines/manufactories

exploration.name: Magnate
exploration.description: Allows building up to 8 different mines and manufactories.

levels.effect: Build up to 8 mines/manufactories

legend.notes: Legend tree is locked until player level 30. No skills available to document yet.
